message:
feat(node): epoch-based counter rollover for safe ID generation in 3 gate modules

Implements OperationSlot and TraceSlot patterns for generating unique
IDs that survive counter rollover without collision. When a u64
counter wraps, the epoch increments and is embedded in the generated
ID, guaranteeing uniqueness across the full u128 space:

- api/compat_gate.rs (+92 lines): Epoch-based rollover for trace
  and receipt IDs. Adds 3 tests: trace_counter_rollover, receipt_
  counter_rollover, and combined gate_check_rollover

- api/fleet_quarantine.rs (+130 lines): OperationSlot struct for
  operation ID generation with epoch tracking. Adds 2 tests:
  operation_id_rollover and combined quarantine_rollover test.
  Also renames one existing test for clarity.

- policy/compatibility_gate.rs (+97 lines): TraceSlot struct for
  trace/transition/receipt ID generation. Adds 3 tests:
  transition_id_uses_same_slot, receipt_id_uses_same_slot,
  trace_slot_rollover

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
